name: UNIVERSAL LOGISTICS HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: Universal Logistics Holdings, Inc. is a holding company whose subsidiaries provide customized transportation and logistics solutions across North America and select international markets. Services include value-added logistics, dedicated transportation, intermodal drayage, and trucking (dry van, flatbed, heavy-haul, refrigerated). The company operates through three reportable segments—Contract Logistics, Intermodal, and Trucking—primarily serving automotive, industrial, retail, consumer goods, energy, and metals sectors, with General Motors representing approximately 25% of total revenues.

products.name: Contract Logistics
products.description: Value-added and dedicated transportation services including material handling, sequencing, sub-assembly, kitting, warehousing, and rail lift services for industrial manufacturers and retailers.

products.name: Intermodal
products.description: Local and regional drayage services including steamship-truck and rail-truck moves between ports or railheads and customer facilities.

products.name: Trucking
products.description: Dry van, flatbed, heavy-haul, and refrigerated operations transporting automotive parts, machinery, building materials, food products, steel, and other goods.

products.name: Terminal Management Services (Parsec)
products.description: Terminal management and related services to Class I, regional, and short-line railroads across North America.

partnerships.description: Top customer representing approximately 25% of total revenues; served through contract logistics and transportation services.
